responseSchema.description: The result set for the deal item search.

dealItems.description: A list of deal items that match the search criteria.

items.description: The detailed data returned for the deal item.

additionalImages.description: The additional images for the deal item.

items.description: The type that defines the details of an image, such as size and URL.

imageUrl.description: The relative path to the image location.

text.description: The text associated with the image.

categoryAncestorIds.description: The IDs of the ancestors for the primary category.

categoryId.description: The ID of the leaf category for the deal item. A leaf category is the lowest level in a category and has no children.

commissionable.description: A boolean value specifying whether the listing has commission.

dealAffiliateWebUrl.description: The deal associated with the item with affiliate attribution.

dealEndDate.description: The date after which the deal ends.

dealStartDate.description: The date on which the deal starts.

dealWebUrl.description: The web URL for the deal associated with the item.

energyEfficiencyClass.description: A string value specifying the Energy Efficiency class.

image.description: The type that defines the details of an image, such as size and URL.

imageUrl.description: The relative path to the image location.

text.description: The text associated with the image.

itemAffiliateWebUrl.description: The item web URL with affiliate attribution.

itemGroupId.description: The unique identifier for the deal item group. This is the parent item ID for the seller-defined variations. Note: This field is returned for multiple-SKU items.

itemGroupType.description: An enumeration value that indicates the type of item group. An item group contains items that have various aspect differences, such as color, size, or storage capacity. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

itemId.description: The unique identifier for the deal item. Note: This field is only returned for single-SKU items.

itemWebUrl.description: The web URL for the deal item.

legacyItemId.description: The legacy item ID associated with the deal item.

marketingPrice.description: A type that describes the seller discount.

discountAmount.description: The currency and value of the item.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 code representing the currency of the amount in the value field. Default: The currency of the authenticated user's country. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

value.description: The monetary value, in the currency specified by the currency field.

discountPercentage.description: The percentage of the seller discount based on the value returned in the originalPrice field.

originalPrice.description: The currency and value of the item.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 code representing the currency of the amount in the value field. Default: The currency of the authenticated user's country. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

value.description: The monetary value, in the currency specified by the currency field.

priceTreatment.description: The pricing treatment (discount) that was applied to the price of the item. Note: The pricing treatment affects how and where the discounted price can be displayed. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

price.description: The currency and value of the item.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 code representing the currency of the amount in the value field. Default: The currency of the authenticated user's country. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

value.description: The monetary value, in the currency specified by the currency field.

qualifiedPrograms.description: A list of programs applicable to the item.

items.description: For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

shippingOptions.description: The cost required to ship the deal item.

items.description: The details provided for the shipping provider, such as shipping cost and type.

shippingCost.description: The currency and value of the item.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 code representing the currency of the amount in the value field. Default: The currency of the authenticated user's country. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

value.description: The monetary value, in the currency specified by the currency field.

shippingCostType.description: The class of the shipping cost. Valid Values: FIXED or CALCULATED Code so that your app gracefully handles any future changes to this list.

title.description: The title of the deal item.

unitPrice.description: The currency and value of the item.

currency.description: The three-letter ISO 4217 code representing the currency of the amount in the value field. Default: The currency of the authenticated user's country. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

value.description: The monetary value, in the currency specified by the currency field.

unitPricingMeasure.description: The designation used to specify the quantity of the deal item, such as size, weight, volume, and count. This helps buyers compare prices. For example, the following tells the buyer that the item is 7.99 per 100 grams. "unitPricingMeasure": "100g", "unitPrice": {   "value": "7.99",   "currency": "GBP"

href.description: The relative path to the current set of results.

limit.description: The maximum number of items, from the current result set, returned on a single page. Default: 20

next.description: The relative path to the next set of results.

offset.description: The number of items that will be skipped in the result set. This is used with the limit field to control the pagination of the output. For example, if the offset is set to 0 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 1 through 10 from the list of items returned. If the offset is set to 10 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 11 through 20 from the list of items returned. Default: 0

prev.description: The relative path to the previous set of results.

total.description: The total number of matches for the search criteria.

responseSchema.description: The result set for the specified event search criteria.

events.description: A list of results that match the search criteria.

items.description: The result set for the event search.

applicableCoupons.description: A list of coupons associated with the event.

items.description: The details for the coupon available for the item.

terms.description: The terms for the event, provided in a full-text description and summary.

fullText.description: A full-text description of the terms.

summary.description: A summarized description of the terms.

endDate.description: The end date for the event.

eventAffiliateWebUrl.description: The URL of the View Event page for the event, which includes the affiliate tracking ID.

eventId.description: The unique identifier for the event.

eventWebUrl.description: The web URL for the event.

items.description: The type that defines the details of an image, such as size and URL.

imageUrl.description: The relative path to the image location.

text.description: The text associated with the image.

startDate.description: The start date for the event.

terms.description: The terms for the event, provided in a full-text description and summary.

fullText.description: A full-text description of the terms.

summary.description: A summarized description of the terms.

href.description: The relative path to the current set of results.

limit.description: The maximum number of items, from the current result set, returned on a single page. Default: 20

next.description: The relative path to the next set of results.

offset.description: The number of items that will be skipped in the result set. This is used with the limit field to control the pagination of the output. For example, if the offset is set to 0 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 1 through 10 from the list of items returned. If the offset is set to 10 and the limit is set to 10, the method will retrieve items 11 through 20 from the list of items returned. Default: 0

prev.description: The relative path to the previous set of results.

total.description: The total number of matches for the specified search criteria.
